GWA Element ID	GWA Element Name	IWA Element ID	IWA Element Name	DWA Element ID	DWA Element Name
4.A.2	Information Input	4.A.2.a.1.a	Getting Information	4.A.2.a.1.a.1	Analyze data to inform operational decisions.
4.A.4	Communicating and Interacting	4.A.4.a.4.a	Communicating with Supervisors, Peers, or Subordinates	4.A.4.a.4.a.1	Prepare technical reports.
4.A.2	Information Input	4.A.2.a.3.a	Monitoring Processes, Materials, or Surroundings	4.A.2.a.3.a.1	Monitor health or safety conditions.
